codeReview.summary: The feature implements the settings sidebar, scrim behavior, lock flow, and clear-credentials modal, but misses a required Rotate Share interaction behavior.

issues.description: The Rotate Share button is rendered as an enabled action but has no click handler and is not disabled. The feature description requires this control to either navigate to `/rotate-share` or be presented as a disabled placeholder.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `ui-builder` skill requires invoking the `agent-browser` skill for manual verification, but workers are using direct `agent-browser` CLI commands and still marking procedure as followed. The skill procedure likely needs to reflect actual expected tooling usage.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/ui-builder/SKILL.md (Required Skills + Step 8) vs worker transcript skeleton for session `2ada3707-89c7-474c-b5a8-81ff36eebe7f` in mission `worker-transcripts.jsonl`, which contains many `agent-browser --session ...` Execute commands and no `Skill {"skill": "agent-browser"}` invocation.

summary: Fail: found one blocking issue — Rotate Share is neither wired to navigation nor marked disabled as a placeholder. Shared-state note: ui-builder skill guidance and observed transcript practice diverge for agent-browser usage.
